name: Yuki-Musume, the Ice Mayakashi
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>氷</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>つらら</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>魔妖</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>まやかし</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－<ruby lang="jp"><rb>雪</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ゆき</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>娘</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>むすめ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: If you control a "Mayakashi" card, other than "Yuki-Musume, the Ice Mayakashi" while this card is in your hand or GY: You can Special Summon this card, then send 1 Zombie monster from your Deck to the GY. You can only use this effect of "Yuki-Musume, the Ice Mayakashi" once per turn. You cannot Special Summon monsters from the Extra Deck, except "Mayakashi" monsters.
mnst_eff: If you control a "Mayakashi" card, other than "Yuki-Musume, the Ice Mayakashi" while this card is in your hand or GY: You can Special Summon this card, then send 1 Zombie monster from your Deck to the GY. You can only use this effect of "Yuki-Musume, the Ice Mayakashi" once per turn. You cannot Special Summon monsters from the Extra Deck, except "Mayakashi" monsters.
eff: If you control a "Mayakashi" card, other than "Yuki-Musume, the Ice Mayakashi" while this card is in your hand or GY: You can Special Summon this card, then send 1 Zombie monster from your Deck to the GY. You can only use this effect of "Yuki-Musume, the Ice Mayakashi" once per turn. You cannot Special Summon monsters from the Extra Deck, except "Mayakashi" monsters.

action: Sends from your Deck to your Graveyard
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
Special Summons itself from your Graveyard
Restricts the player's Special Summons from the Extra Deck
Restricts the player's Special Summons to archetype specific monsters
